$comment: Schema version 4.1 - BL6: added optional top-level declared_effects block (effect envelope narrowing).
title: Blueprint Workflow Schema
description: JSON Schema for hiivmind-blueprint workflow.yaml files

description.description: Brief description of the workflow's purpose

trust_mode.description: Workflow-level trust mode (BL3). Declarative metadata consumed by runtimes; blueprint-lib validates the enum only.

data_mcps.description: Map of alias to MCP server name + semver range (e.g. 'eightball-tools@^1'). Aliases prefix mcp_tool_call tool references (BL4).

payload_types.description: Workflow-scoped payload type declarations (BL2). Keys are name@version; values are field maps. Referenced by consequences via params_type.

declared_effects.description: Optional per-alias effect envelope narrowing the inferred default from data_mcps (BL6). Keys are aliases declared in data_mcps (or unused aliases used as forbidden documentation). Values are either the string literal 'forbidden' or an object with optional 'tools' and 'max_call_count'. Cross-alias validation (tools subset, alias-in-data_mcps) is delegated to the consuming runtime.

tools.description: Allowed tool names on this alias. Subset of the data-MCP's published tools (runtime-checked).

max_call_count.description: Hard cap on invocations of this alias per workflow run (static upper bound).

entry_preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before workflow can start

initial_state.description: Initial state values when workflow begins. Note: Some fields are computed at runtime and not declared here - see $comment for details.
initial_state.$comment: Runtime fields (computed at initialization, not declared): interface (string: 'claude_code' or 'claude_ai' based on AskUserQuestion tool availability), workflow_name, workflow_version, current_node, previous_node, history, user_responses, checkpoints, awaiting_input

output.description: Unified output configuration (logging + display). Extracted by engine in Phase 2, Step 2.2.

prompts.description: User prompt execution mode configuration. Extracted by engine in Phase 2, Step 2.3.

imports.description: External YAML files to load at workflow start

start_node.description: ID of the first node to execute

default_error.description: Default node reference for unhandled failures. Must reference a node of type `ending`. Action nodes without on_failure and conditional nodes without on_unknown route here.

nodes.description: Map of node IDs to node definitions
